review_text:
小型で小さいので使い易い。
トリマーがついているのである程度の長さ調節が可能。
電池式。

Amazonページにも説明書にも詳しく説明が無い為、どこから電池を入れるのか散々開ける場所を探しましたが分からず‥スイッチオンにしても起動せず諦めようかなと思いましたがふと底が気になり回してみたところ、、電池が入ってました。絶縁テープがある為オンにならなかったみたいです。
とりあえずもみあげ等のちょっとした部分のケアが簡単に出来ますね。
頭のアタッチメントが外れやすいのが気になりました。

思ったよりコンパクトで軽いですね。単三電池は既にセット済みで、それでも軽量なのは助かります。
見た目は黒一色なので高級感はありません。
収納箱はとてもおしゃれで良い感じです。日本語の説明書はありますが、詳しくは書いてませんでした。
電池の取り外し方法はありませんので、あちらこちらを見てはいじくりまわして、やっと分かる感じです。
使用感はとても良く、コンパクトで軽いので取り回しが容易で便利です。
アタッチメントは一種類ですが、これで十分ですね。いっぱい合っても殆ど使わないケースが殆どですしね。
このサイズ感なら、出張等にも荷物にならず持っていけます。
review_title: 軽くてコンパクト持ってる手も疲れない

review_text:
乾電池式のヒゲトリマー　
刃の幅が2cm弱と狭いので、もみあげやチョビ髭の端を整えるぐらいにしか使えない。
アゴ髭を伸ばしている人はヒゲ用のバリカンとシェーバーを併用するほうが短時間でグルーミングが完了するだろう。

プラスチック製のアタッチメントはどちら向きにはめるのか分かりにくかった。
アタッチメントのコームは指で押して出し入れする方式だが、商品説明で「2mmから14mmまで」５段階にセットできるとは言うものの、出し入れがスムーズではなく、好みの長さにセットしずらいし、スタートが2mmだとして、１段階が2mmだとすると５回押し出しても＜4,6,8,10,12＞で12mmにしかならないような気がする。

いずれにせよ、会社のロッカーや車のグローブボックスに放り込んでおき、剃り漏れがあった時に応急的に使うぐらいがせいぜいだと思う。

本格的にヒゲのグルーミングがしたいなら、やはり今使っているパナソニックのヒゲバリカン　ER-GB40-W＜ASIN： B00BVW2M7U＞のほうが使いやすいし、価格的にも性能的にも段違いに優秀だ。

付属するコームが１つと少ないため用途は少し狭まりますが、
本体はシンプルでカジュアルにつかえるので重宝しています。
また電源は充電式ではなく乾電池式で定期的な交換が必要ですが、
逆に電池を交換すればすぐにつかえるというメリットもあり気に入っています。
駆動のモーターもマブチモーターを使っており信頼性も高いのでおすすめです。
review_title: 充電式ではなく乾電池式。

review_text:
ブレードの角度や長さ、スライド式調整コームの形状が
ヒゲトリマーとして使いやすい設計です。

ブレード自体の剃り心地は良く、
スムーズにトリミングできます。

IPX8防水仕様で、風呂場で水を利用して剃ることもできるので

敏感肌の方への警告！

これまで多くのブランドのシェーバーを使ってきましたが、今回のものは最悪でした。肌が痛いし、髪を引っ張るし、濃いヒゲにはほとんど効果がありません。それに、シェービング後は不均一な仕上がりになります。

私は通常、良い製品についてのみレビューを書くのですが、この経験を共有して他の人々に警告したいと思いました。敏感肌や濃いヒゲの方は購入前に十分注意してください。

______

Warning for Anyone with Sensitive Skin!

I’ve tried many razors from various brands over the years, but this one is by far the worst I’ve ever used. It hurts my skin, pulls my hair, and struggles to cut through my thicker beard. On top of that, it leaves an uneven shave.

I typically only write reviews for products I’m happy with, but I felt compelled to share my experience to warn others. Please be cautious before purchasing if you have sensitive skin or a thicker beard.

音も静かでとても使いやすいです。
オススメの商品です。
けっこう短く出来ます。切れ味もいいしラインもいれやすい。

猫さんの暑さ対策の為に購入しました。獣医さんに相談してお腹の毛を短くすることになり、病院で使っている物の後継機を選びました。

付属の機械油は成分が表示されていなかったので、猫さんが舐めても安全な別の油で代用しました（自己責任で）。

音は病院の物より静かだと感じました。高音域が抑えられていて静かに感じるような気がします。といっても猫さんにとっては怖い音に属するようなので、事前に充分慣らせてから使いました。

3mmと6mmのアタッチメントが付いていて、毛の流れに沿って使うと毛先の方がカットされてボリュームを抑えられます。逆毛を立てるように使うと結構短くなります。
猫さんの毛は細く柔らかいので、アタッチメントと刃の間に詰まってしまい、すぐに（一撫で程度で）切れなくなります。その度に付属のブラシで取り除くのですが、作業が全然捗らず…結局アタッチメントは使わずすべすべの仕上がりにしました。

猫さんの性格によっては、すべすべになった部分を気にしてずっと舐めて傷を作ってしまう場合もあるとのことですので、毛の長さの判断は慎重にすることをお勧めします。一度に刈る面積を小さくして様子を見ながら進めるのも良いかと思います。脇の下などは、腕の方と脇腹の方の毛を刈る日をずらして、一方の毛が伸びてチクチクしなくなってから他方を刈るようにするなども良さそうです。

飽くまでも本品は人間仕様だと思われますので、毛の刈り方や注意点は専門家の指導を仰いで、怪我のないよう、特に腹部は乳首を傷つけないよう、充分に気をつけてください。

因みに、参考になるかどうか分かりませんが、うちの子達をバリカンに慣らせた手順は
1 電源を切ったバリカンにアタッチメントをつけて床に置いておき、自由に匂いを嗅がせる（数時間）
2 猫さんを手で撫でながら、電源を切ったバリカンでも撫でる（10分）
3 人間が腕や脚にあてて、電源を入れて音を立てながら使うふりをする（30分）
3 猫さんを撫でながら、出来るだけ腕を伸ばして遠い位置で電源を入れて音を聞かせる（3分）
4 猫さんを撫でながら、電源を入れたバリカンを20センチくらい浮かしてエアー毛刈りをする（3分）
5 手とバリカンの動きを気にしなくなったら実際に少しだけ毛を刈る
6 一度に少しずつ、数日かけて気長に刈る

review_text: This trimmer kit includes everything you need to trim hair from all those odd places such a nose, ears, eyebrows, facial hair, and pretty much any other place where you need a trim.  It includes three different trimmer heads that are each easy to interchange and clean. It also includes attachments for the bear and eyebrow trimmers so you can set a specific length. The cover only fits with the nose trimmer.  It also includes a "AA" battery.  The only thing it doesn't include is some kind of case, so I've just been keeping it in the box it came in. Overall I've been very happy with how this works and in fact it works much better than the Norelco I purchased just before this, which I was very disappointed with. The noise level on this trimmer is not too bad. It does make a buzzing noise, but it's not as loud as others.  All of the trimmers are waterproof and can be cleaned by just running them under the sink. Since it comes in a nice box this also makes a great gift.
review_title: Perfect trimmer for all the little places

review_text: Good ear and nose trimmer. Compact and sturdy, easy to use and clean. AA battery is needed though. Overall this is a good quality trimmer, would have been real good if it was rechargeable though but other than that, does just what it says it does. Good to take when traveling as well.

I have used a variety of different powered trimmers over the years but this one has the widest selection of trimming attachments.

The set comes in a nice presentation pack that is useful for storage.  The motor is certainly powerful enough to drive the heads through the thickest of hair without that irritating, and sometimes painful, snagging you get when the blades stop mid-cut.  No such problems with this one.

The usual rounded nose hair and straight ear hair attachments are included but I like the fact that there is also a 'beard trimmer' attachment which is useful for trimming the hair above and below the lips when I haven't shaved for a few days.  The eyebrow trimmers a great as well because they set a safe depth so you can't scalp them!

I did experience one issue when the nose trimmer attachment became stuck on the head and wouldn't detach. I let everything dry out and was then able to remove it although the blades detached from the outer shell.  I was able to reassemble it fairly easily though and have not had a repeat of the problem.

The only other improvement I can think of would be the inclusion of a small bottle of cutter oil.  I've found that a regular application of oil keeps the blades sharp and spinning and have my own bottle but many others likely won't.  This is particularly important if the trimmer is used in a wet environment.

Overall, this is a good trimmer set and I can recommend it.
review_title: A nice selection of cutting heads

review_text: Exactly as described

review_text:
This little set intrigued me so I decided to try it out.  I shave my head but grow my beard and mustache out, but keep both fairly short.  While I've used the nose hair trimmer and it works fine, I'm actually using the angled trimmer the most.

I don't like having my mustache hair growing over my lip, but it's a tad tricky finding a trimmer that can fit in the narrow space between mustache and upper lip without threatening to trim off another part of my mustache or press on my lip.  This attachment works beautifully for this exact scenario.

It's got enough power to cleanly snip the hairs without tugging, but it's not so aggressive I worry about it grabbing and cutting my upper lip.  And it's small enough to carefully maneuver around without worry of accidentally trimming into part of my mustache that I don't want trimmed.

My only gripe about this set is the fact that it uses a AA size battery.  So many portable trimmers/shavers use rechargeable lithium batteries these days, and lithium batteries have far superior performance compared to alkaline batteries.  Sure, you can get yourself a lithium AA size battery, but those aren't cheap.

If the battery isn't a big deal to you and you need a small, precision trimmer, then this is a good one to consider.
review_title: Really helpful for light, precision trimming

review_text: I'm not sure I like the idea of a battery because I'd rather have a USB rechargeable. The trimmer is small and compact and does eyebrows [includes eyebrow combs]. review_text:
The best part about this is all the attachments, as this will handle any issue at hand with your face and hair. Has an attachment for them all. Being waterproof is another plus but the smooth plastic construction of this gets slippery when using in the shower. Battery operated is not usually my first choice as I would of rather this include a rechargeable battery, especially at this price point. This is easily cleanable and comes apart to keep all running like expected. This overall cuts well, provides a handful of attachments and is waterproof. Would of been nice to include a travel pouch, rechargeable battery and a better quality handle to use when wet.
At this price point of just under $30 at time of review, def on the higher side for what you get.
review_title: Like all the attachments that it comes with, some room for improvements

review_text: I got this for my husband because I recently got a similar ladies one and LOVED it. He loves this one as well. The blade options are very versatile and this one gadget replaces several trimmers that you could have bulked up. He loves it for all the maintenance and it works great!

I have bushy eyebrows (sometimes much worse than the "before" eyebrow in the picture), so I got this to tame them. I've been using an old beard trimmer that has given up the ghost.

I like this little tool! It's lightweight, but it feels substantial enough in my hand. The attachments are all nicely made and fit well. The instructions are as detailed as they have to be for what we're dealing with.

For my first trial run, I've learned from experience not to go to the dangerous extreme, so I put on the long eyebrow guard. Good decision - it trimmed them down perfectly. It was quick, quiet, and easy to use accurately. I may or may not use the other attachments, although I love it that the "default" is the ear and nose hair trimmer. The seller knows guys. If I grow a beard again, this will come in handy.

I also like it that it uses a single AA battery, rather than being plug-in rechargeable. I have lots of micro-USB cords laying around for various devices, and it is a bother to have to stop and recharge something in the middle of using it. I have plenty of rechargeable AA batteries around too, and it will take just a few seconds to pop one of those in as needed.

I will probably not want to travel with this, but the small size will make it easy to store. The price, $28.61 as I'm writing this, seems reasonable for a nice little grooming tool.
review_title: Nice Little Grooming Tool, Compact and Effective

review_text:
URBANER MB-980 Waterproof Facial Hair Grooming Kit for Men, Cordless, Battery Operated Ear and Nose Hair Trimmer, Compact Eyebrow Trimmer Beard Shaver is for tiny, detailed hair trimming. This set is very tiny, the blades are very small. The trimmer body is very smooth, so it easily slips in your hand while using it, especially if it’s wet. There needs to be some grooves on the sides of the trimmer itself, so it won’t slip. There are three heads- a cone shaped nose hair trimmer, a side straight blade eyebrow, ear hair trimmer and a straight edge for any other tiny trimming anywhere.

There are also 2 combs for the side edge blade and a comb for the straight edge blade, for longer cutting.  Also included is a tiny brush for cleaning and the batteries in the trimmer are included. The set itself feels flimsy. The blades are really too tiny to cut much hair. I suppose this would be good for someone who has very fine, very little hair to trim, but it is pretty useless for a person with normal hair. The tiny 3/4 inch blades barely stick out for actual cutting. The average person may find this too tiny for trimming, so I have to give it 3 STARS for a person with fine hair.
This ear and nose trimmer works as expected. One thing that sets this one apart is that it also has a cover, which makes it easy for traveling. Good choice.
It works ok, but is not a high precision clipper.  Attachments are minimal but they work.  The comb used for cutting longer lengths doesn't seem to work all that well.
review_title: It's ok but not high precision.

review_text: The product works great. Overall, there’s not a lot of difference in this brand versus others, but the fact that you can do so much with just one device is really nice. I hate clutter countertops and this certainly solves that problem. Easy to clean as well. Recommended.

数年使ったひげトリマーが切れなくなってきたので数千円程度の代替え品を物色しUSBで"急速"充電できるというこの製品がタイムセールだったせいもあり購入した。
最近は充電方法はUSBが普通で、”USB充電の際には必ず 「5V 1A」 仕様のアダプターをご利用してください。”というところに引っかかったが、まあいいやとそのときは思った。製品付属の説明書にも、大きくそのように書いてあるが、自分はそういう仕様のUSB充電器をもっていないので、手持ちの8Wとか9Wの充電器を使ってみたが危険は感じなかった。パソコンのUSB端子は、500mA程度のはずだが、それでも充電できているようだ。
たぶんメーカーとしてはPD対応などの高電圧が出る可能性のある充電器をつかってほしくないという意味だと思うが、ユーザーは困惑する。”5V出力のUSB充電器を使ってください。”とか”USB PD充電器は使えません。”ならまだわかる。
この製品の充電ケーブルは、片方がUSBのType-Aなのだが、機器側は昔からの丸プラグになっている。スマホと同じ充電器およびケーブルが使えることを期待していたのでがっかりした。(専用の充電器のものよりはましだが、、、)どうせなら、機器側をType-CにしてスマホやPCと共通の充電環境にすれば旅行時に荷物が減らせて良いと思う。旧製品を在庫処分したら新型はそうなるのかも？

1年の保証期間がある商品なので現在、カスタマーセンターに返金依頼を相談しています。
無事適用されればよいなと思っています。

ひげの長さを調整していましたが、本商品は0.5mm刻みのダイヤルで交換の手間もなく便利です。
信頼性があって末永く利用できれば言うことなしでした。

Do NOT NOT NOT buy any men grooming products, especially the kits, from this Hong Kong based company - Ufree. Looks nice, comes with an attached blade (has own fitted plastic combs available) held in place by 2 screws - not easily detachable. Once screws removed, the plastic & spring assembly underneath blade plate springs apart - you are never going to get it back together. Why remove? There are numerous other attachments that allegedly just snap into place where the original attached blade assembly is. Nope. Not going to happen. These other attachments also have their own sealed assemblies with screws and fitted plastic combs that DO pop-on / pop-off. The Ufree site, User's Pamphlet, and YouTube videos do not closely show how this is all supposed to be done - just show the fitted plastic combs popping on and off. Ufree customer service sends email saying it's an Amazon issue and auto chat says someone will review the issue someday. The numerous emails now received say Amazon will fix it. It is NOT an Amazon issue.
review_title: Ufree Men's Grooming Kits-No Clear Instructions, Videos For Trimmer Clipper Swap Outs

The Ufree Beard Trimmer is a good personal trimmer that does what it says at an affordable price.  Although there are a few minor quirks that are worth mentioning, I would recommend this trimmer to a friend.

The device feels nice in the hand; solid, with a good heft to it.  Attachments snap tightly to the base, leaving virtually no chance for clippings to get into the works.  The power/speed button is easy to use (much better than a slippery slider switch), but its location may cause accidental operation while changing trimmer heads.

As a light user who trims a goatee two or three times a week and usually shaves once weekly, this has been a good personal groomer.  I've tried all of the 6 trimmer heads that are included, and each performed well when used for its designed purpose.  Like any multi-use tool, it's important to choose the correct trimmer head for the task at hand.  For example, the shaver attachment is not a lawn mower.  Read the instructions.

Changing a trimmer head requires a fair amount of force to both remove and attach the head, but once it's latched into place it is solid with zero wobble.  I've accidentally turned the thing on almost every time I've changed a trimmer head.  I suspect this is a known design issue because the instructions attempt to describe a specific way to hold the device when changing the head, which doesn't really work for me.  It feels more natural to hold the unit with the (easily triggered) power button facing my palm, and that's the problem.  It would be helpful if the button were slightly recessed to prevent the accidental triggering.

The included storage/display stand is not particularly useful.  There is a spot for each of the various heads and attachments, but they are tightly packed and the pieces do not lock into place.  This makes selecting the thing you want a bit clumsy, as I invariably knock something out of place, causing it to fall onto the counter.  Annoyingly, there is no dedicated slot for the included cleaning brush, which I use after every trimming session.

Although the device comes with a USB-C cord for charging, no charger is included.  Any standard cell phone charger seems to work fine, and I'm sure most people have one or two spares lying around, so keep this in mind if you want to charge the unit in the same location where you use it and your wall outlet doesn't include a USB charging port.

Overall, the usefulness and modest cost of the Ufree Beard Trimmer outweigh these minor complaints.

review_text: Best trimmer I ever had

Here's an honest review:

I was excited to try the Beard Club PT-45 beard and hair trimmer, but unfortunately, it didn't quite meet my expectations.

Pros:
- The trimmer has a sleek, sturdy design and a user-friendly battery interface that displays the charge percentage.
It comes with a variety of colored hair combs, which is a nice touch.

Cons:
- The blade quality is lacking. It’s not sharp enough to provide a smooth, clean cut, which is disappointing for the price point.
- The attachment combs are difficult to slide on and off, requiring a lot of effort, which can be frustrating.
- The trimmer is heavier than expected, and its RPM isn't sufficient for a crisp cut.
- Even a budget, no-name brand trimmer I tried outperformed this one in terms of cutting quality.
- The blade can pop off easily, and reattaching it is a bit of a hassle, especially since the lowest setting isn't skin-tight.

In summary, while the trimmer looks good and has some nice features, the performance doesn't justify the cost. I wouldn't recommend it if you're looking for a precise, professional-grade trim.

The reason for this is because without using one of the plastic guides, you can go to 2mm length, the smallest plastic guide is 3mm, and the lowest setting on the unit itself is 0.8mm. So with the unit set at the lowest, and the #1 guide installed, your at 3.8 mm. review_text:
This trimmer works well but it lacks enough guides and built in adjustability to make this truly great. The trimmer itself can adjust from .8mm to 2mm.  Most of the guides are 3mm apart but the two that are important to me are 4mm apart. There is a 6mm guide and the next size up is 10mm. The 6mm guide gives you 6.8mm to 8mm. The 10mm guide gives you 10.8mm to 12mm. So, there is a 2.8mm dead spot between 8mm and 10.8mm. That is a huge gap for a shorter beard. The other guides being 3mm apart give you a dead spot of 1.8mm which on a much longer beard is not much of an issue. But with a much shorter beard that 2.8mm gap is an issue.
Ideally, the guides for this trimmer should be 2mm apart which would then allow for full coverage. Unfortunately, more guides are not available. If you keep your beard in the 9mm range, this trimmer is not for you.

I contacted Amazon about possibly exchanging the item for something else, but they refused to help.  I will never buy another product from Beard Club again.

As I'm desperate for a shave and the trimmer I got from a pharmacy sucks in the meantime, I decided to take this one apart. I'm not really sure what I did - there are two small screws in the base that allow the bottom charging plate to fall out. I pulled on some wires, brushed some stuff, and then it started charging again. I'm happy that I'll be able to shave today, I'm not happy I had to do this in the first place.
review_title: When it worked it was good, then I got E1

review_text:
Functionally this is one of the best trimmers I've ever owned. However, the battery life is so abysmal that I can't give it anything about a 2. Multiple times I've started fully charged, right off the charger, and had it die halfway through my trim. A great trim doesn't matter if I have to go on a date or interview with a half-trimmed face. I'd look like a clown! On other occasions I've had it on the charger at 100, unplugged the charger because the charging light is *insanely* bright and keeps me awake, just to wake up in the morning to it at 50%. I've looked all over to see if I'm draining the power in some way, but if I am then that just means this thing is too complicated.

I want to recommend it because it really is a great trimmer. The setting options are awesome and it's easy to use. But geeze, at this point it would be more useful if it was a wind up.
Good for cutting hair, not as good at beard trimming.
Disappointed 😞 doesn't trim close enough with the gaurds that came with it.

Other trimmers didn’t have the power or the guards to help get my faded beard look right. This trimmer does the trick! The amount of guards and the trimmer settings that allow you to change length on the trimmer make it a breeze. The only thing keeping this from getting 5 stars is the lack of storage for the guards. Just some way of keeping them organized or at least together would send it over the top. Overall, I would still buy again

Beard and body.  This thing yanks out hairs at any speed, any setting and any attachment.  I'm very disappointed.  Would not recommend this product to anyone.  I want to give it zero stars, but I'll do 2 or 3 because I think people ignore 0 or 1 star reviews.

The biggest problem I have with it is that the guards slip ever so slightly so they do not sit flush which causes the trimmer to pull hairs out and it is extremely painful/annoying. I'm much past my return period but I will be replacing this and if I had to go back and choose again I would not get this same trimmer.

The trimmer itself looks great. Good packaging, arrived on time, everything. But for the price point I'd expect much better performance. I've never had a trimmer tug and pull this much. Usually I use $20 Norelco trimmers and this has just not lived up to that standard. Had to make more passes than usual because it was missing hairs so often. I can't stress enough how much this thing was just pulling on my beard hairs instead of properly cutting them. I've never experienced that, even from the trimmers that cost 1/3 of the price.

The best thing about this trimmer is the dock. Looks great, doubles as a night light for my bathroom and keeps the trimmer charged. However, the trimmer doesn't click in place and doesn't stand perfectly upright in the dock. It leans pretty heavily and makes me concerned about whether or not it will tip over.

The trimmer does have redundancy for the power supply, though. Even if something happened to the dock, the power cord can plug directly into the trimmer. Which is a nice feature.

All in all, if this thing cost $20 it would be a good purchase. But for $70+? I'd say look elsewhere.

Selection of blade guide could be improved for accuracy. Would be nice if the kit included 45° angle guides for blending. Overall, I am pleased with the build and weight of the trimmer. Highly adjustable as well.
Power wouldn't turn off. Had to order another one. 2 stars for words well but broke 3 weeks after being brand new. I question the quality.

Nice trimmers for beards the problem I had that they did  pull hairs a lot on my first trim but that stops the longer you use them. If you want a closer trim you’ll need to go over the area a couple times. But all around pretty good trimmers.

Also, the motor on the shaver is very loud.  It sounds like a 747 jet is landing in your bathroom.  Other than those nuances, this shaver does exactly what it is advertised to do!

I looked inside and found the battery used was a garbage 2000mha 18650. This is what happens when you go with the lowest bidder to build your product.

本品はオランダに本社を置く大手電気製品メーカー「philips（フィリップス）」の電動ヘアカッター「HC3505/15」です。
◎セット内容:ヘアカッター本体、ACアダプター（電源コード長さ1.5m）、コーム、お掃除ブラシ、日本語取り扱い説明書
◎本体外寸:188×50×56mm　重さ126g
◎消費電力:9W
◎コームをセットしてのカットの長さ:1、3、5～23mmまで2mmづつ（コーム無しだと0.5mm）
◎使ってみた感想
・自分は短髪で自分で髪をカットします。コレまで５年間使ってきた同社の電動ヘアカッターが寿命で使えなくなったことによる代替で本機を購入致しました。本品は近頃の電動ヘアカッターの主流である「充電式」とは異なり昔ながらの「有線式」のスタイルを取っています。電源コードが本体から伸びた状態で散髪作業を行わなければいけないデメリットが存在しますが、逆に「充電式」と違って作業中電気切れを気にすることもなく、作業前に「充電量は充分か？」「充電作業をして置かなければいけないのか？」と余計な事を考えずに何時でも作業が出来るメリットが存在します。自分は前の電動ヘアカッターでも「有線式」だったので有線での作業に慣れておりデメリットを感じていません。そしてセット内容はシンプルですし、操作方法は簡単。刃は作業後取り外して丸洗いできますし油の塗布を必要としません。そして保証は「２年」と長いのも嬉しい点です。そういった事を考えますと本品は充分満足できる品だと思います。

hc3410を長く使って来ました。約5年使用で歯と本体とのはまり具合にガタつきが出て異音が出るようになった事、自動研磨刃とはいえ少し切れ味が落ちたので同じ3000シリーズのこちらへ。  コード有りタイプで常に一定の性能で使える事とアダプター無しで0.5ミリに刈れる事と注油が必要なく自動研磨刃であるのがメリット。さらに安価であること。  ただ替え刃を買おうとすると……買い換えしても良さそうな値段になるのと水洗い不可なのがデメリット。ユーザーのスタイルでメリットデメリットは変わるのでマイナスレビューはしません。買い換え前のhc3410が注油無し刃の買い換え無しで何年も使えて来た事を考えればかなりのメリットだと思います。
ケーブルが硬く邪魔。

1mmから23mm
まで区切られていて、2ブロックの僕のショートカットでも、自分でかなり楽にカットできます♪
これで、しばらくは美容室に行かなくても大丈夫そうです！

優秀！

コンセントから直接電源を取るタイプなので、本体が軽く腕が疲れない。
耐水性は論外です。

別のフィリップスのバリカンの電源アダプターを持っていましたので、繋ぎ変えましたがダメでした。

Battery life is ok
review_title: I expected it to give me a clean shave. It didn’t!

review_text:
経緯
　元々PHILIPSのバリカンには興味は持っていたのですが、近年注目を集める櫛形のバリカンにも興味を持っていました。
しかしAmazonで販売している中国製品の櫛形をイマイチ信用出来ず、さてどうするかと思案していた最中、某家電量販店で通販で販売している櫛形のバリカンと本商品と同じ物を発見。
前者は8000円。後者は期間限定価格で当時Amazonの価格と同じ3100円。
この5000円の差はデカく、ダメ元でPHILIPSの本商品を買った次第。

用途
ツーブロック等の小難しそうな事はせず、現在の髪型を基本に全体のボリュームを抑えたいと言うもの。
櫛形に引かれていたのは、この部分が従来のバリカンより簡単に失敗無く出来そうだと思ったからです。
そして、上記のダメ元とは従来のバリカンの使い方、下から上では無く。櫛形の様に上から下に使えるのか？と言う意味です。
以前から従来のバリカンでも上から下に使えるのか？と色々と検索はしてみたものの検索の仕方が悪かったのか全て従来の下から上のモノで有り、購入後ダメ元でやってみた結果は・・・・成功でした。
使い始めは、おっかなびっくりでしたが、ある程度慣れると前髪も含めて大胆に使用しても切り過ぎる・変な段差になる事も有りませんでした。

メリット・デメリット
メリット
●軽さ。
　バッテリーが入って無い分、非常に軽いです。
コードを含めても女性も子供も疲れなく使える軽さ。
●シンプル
　構造が非常にシンプルで説明書を読まなくても分解も含めて直感的に使えます。
一応記載しとけば、1のメモリが1番の短く23のメモリが長いです。
●メンテナンスが楽。
　PHILIPS製品最大のメリット部分。
個人的には使用後は付属のブラシで掃除しますが、細い毛を無視すればものの5分も掛かりません。面倒くさいなら刃の部分を水洗いで済ませばOK。
シェーバーをお使いの方で、定期的なオイル差しが面倒と感じる方にはピッタリな商品。

デメリット
●コード
　価格とトレードオフとは言え、邪魔と言えば邪魔。
コードの長さは1mほど。床に座りながらの使用は問題は有りませんが、椅子の場合は延長コードも視野に。外での使用は論外、バッテリータイプの購入をオススメします。
●音
　本商品最大のデメリット。
使用中は絶えず甲高い音が鳴り響きます、
一言で言えばうるさい。
防音や広い部屋ならまだしも、隣部屋との壁が薄いのなら深夜の使用は止めた方が良いです。
●引っ掛かり
　これは本商品を上から下に使用している事が原因の可能性がアリ。
使用直後から頭髪全体に引っ掛かりを覚えます。
使用後2〜3日で解消されますが、自然になのかリンスが要因なのか。　
個人差が有る可能性も。　

総評
個人的には望んだ使い方が出来たので星5でも良かったのですが、使用時間を選ぶ事と通常使いをしてないので星4で。
ただ、櫛形のバリカンの購入を検討している方は、本商品の一考の余地は有ると思います。
他に気付いた事が有れば後に記載したいと思います。

コロナが始まって、それまで通っていた○○ハウス、を止めて自宅バリカンに挑戦。
その時購入した、この商品の前モデル（2500円程）が、2２回の使用で壊れたので
再度の購入です。
○○ハウス、が1回1200円ですから、抜群のコストパフォーマンスです。
有線は確かに使いにくいですが、刈ってる最中に充電が切れたら、それこそ悲劇
なのと、コードが長くて細いので（ソフトで柔軟、ではありません）慣れれば
それほど気にはなりませんよ？
有線なのと、耐水では無いので、そこの評価は☆なしです。

review_text:

この商品は、一台で4つの機能を備えており、360度洗浄設計の鼻毛カッター、五段階調節可能なヒゲトリマー、緻密な刃で細かい部分まで処理できるフェイスシェーバー、安全性を備えた往復式電気シェーバーを自在に交換できます。日本製の高品質な素材を使用しており、耐久性に優れた高炭素ステンレス鋼を採用しています。また、強力なマブチモーターを搭載しており、毛が引っかかる心配もありません。IPX8最高規格の防水性能で、本体もお風呂で使用可能です。

review_text:

防水性は未確認なのでお風呂場での使用は控えた方が良いです。※事故防止のため電化製品は基本的に水場で使うのはNG

ただ、眉毛処理は少しやりづらいのでそこは慣れるしかありませんね。

中国製でもモーターがマブチモーターということで注文しましたが、さすがに耐久性は高く、お風呂で使っても問題なく使っています。
本体もまるごと洗えるのでいつも清潔だし、ステンレスの刃もきちんとキレイに切れる髭剃りです。

review_title: 洗えるのでいつも清潔

review_text:
☆3つか4つで迷いましたが鼻毛カッターとしての評価で☆4つけました。

☆－1のポイント
私自身が剛毛でひげを剃る際はシェーバーではなくカミソリを使っています。
シェーバーのアタッチメントでひげを剃ってみましたがやはり深剃りはできませんでした。
剃れないことはないのですがところどころ剃り残しが出てしまいます。
毛量が柔らかかったり少ない人であれば使えるのかもしれません。

逆に鼻毛カッター、フェイスシェーバーとしては十分使うことができました。
フェイスシェーバーは眉を整えるアタッチメントがついているので短くしたり長めにしたりと調整できる点はポイントが高いです。
ヒゲは剃るためヒゲトリマーは使っていませんので1台で2役まではこなすことができています。
鼻毛カッター、フェイスシェーバーとしての性能は間違いないので1本あるとぱぱっと身だしなみ整えられておすすめです。
review_title: メインは鼻毛カッター、フェイスシェーバー

review_text:
付属するアタッチメントを取り替えることで様々な用途になるシェーバーです。
通常時は鼻毛カッターです。一番使うのはひげそりだと思います。
本当にただただ普通に高水準に使える内容で、流石にもっと高い単一の髭剃りに剃り感は勝てないといえば勝てないのですが、とにかくこれ一つで完結するというのが魅力。それにそれないわけでもないですし、普通に朝起きて使う、という用途で非常に便利で、髭剃った→あ、ちょっと鼻出そうかも、というときにサクッとアタッチメントを交換して用途を合わせることができるのが良いです。

市販の鼻毛カッターも持っていましたが、あれだとパーツを外して水洗いをして…という手順があったのですが、これだと防水性があるということで、そのままザーッと水洗いできるのがお手軽で良いです。カッターの部分もしっかりしているし、特に不満点は感じられませんでした。

あと、箱がダンボールっぽい材質なのですが高級感があるのが○。あとは持ち運ぶ際には別途入れ物が必要なのは注意ってくらいでしょうか。これで十分でした。
review_title: コレ一つで顔周りを整えられるのが良い

review_text: 毛のケアがまとめてできるので、とても便利です！

ですが、アタッチメントもあり他の使い方も出来るので凄く便利です。

総評として、デメリットは特に感じませんでした。
最低限必要な物は、そろってるのも良いところです。
以上のことから星5つで評価させていただきます。

review_text:
コンパクトでアタッチメントが豊富で取り回しは非常にいい感じ、

review_text:

頻繁に髭剃りをするならこちらの商品では物足りないと思う。
値段的にそこそこの髭剃り機が買えるので、まずはそちらを買うべき
review_title: 髭の切れ味がいいとは言えないが、セットなのが便利

review_text:
４in１のメンズシェーバーセット です。

もう少しアタッチメントの少ない、
リーズナブルな物を何種類か使った事がありますが…
それらの物との違いは、力強さです。
力強い分、リーズナブルな物よりは
音も大きめです。
あと置くだけ簡単な充電スタンドがある点です。

リーズナブルな物は使おうとすると放電していて、毎回充電しなければならなかったので置くだけ充電スタンドは、とても便利です。

【各種アタッチメントについて】

【髭トリマー】
小さいながらもアタッチメントコーム付きで髭の長さ調整可能です(2～14㎜)
洗浄は刃をバリカンのように外せるので中まで洗えます。

【鼻毛カッター】
普通の鼻毛カッターです。
中の刃も外せますが、作動させたまま直接水洗い可能な所が便利です。

【眉毛シェーバー】
アタッチメントコームがあるので安心して眉毛処理が出来ます。
2㎜4㎜コーム、6㎜8㎜コームの２種類です。
洗浄は刃を取り外して行う一般的な物と一緒です。

【髭シェーバー】
T字カミソリのように使える所は使い易いのですが…
切れ味があまり良くないので、
ゆっくり使わないと痛いです。
本格的なシェーバーと比べてはいけません。
洗浄は中の刃も取り外し可能です。

《総評》
髭を蓄えている人が整えるのには、
アタッチメントが充実してるので、かなり使えると思います。

髭が無い人でも、髭トリマーは
もみ上げや襟足の処理に使えますし、
直接水洗いできる鼻毛カッターや
安心して使えるコーム付きの眉毛シェーバーなどは便利です。

気になる点は、
髭シェーバーの切れ味が残念な所ぐらいですかね。まぁ本格的なシェーバー並みに切れたら凄すぎるアイテムですので、オマケで使えるぐらいな感じで思っていた方が良いと思います。

あと、充電スタンドは防水ではないので、本体を良く拭いてから立てる必要があります。

全体的には使い勝手の良い商品だと思います。
review_title: アタッチメントが豊富

review_text:
アダプターが一式ついているので顔用のトリミングがこれ一台でできるようになっています。
使ってみたところかなり便利です。
鼻毛カッターも切れ味が良く巻き込みがないです。
音も底まで大きくないのですし、ボディの質感がマットな感じなので持ちやすいです。
充電スタンド付きで充電もしやすく便利です。（以前使ってたものは電池式で根幹頻度が高かったためかなりうれしいです。）
まゆ毛用のアダプターもありうれしいです。

やや重たさはあるものの動作音も比較的静かです。
コームも４種類あり防水もIPX8と強力なので安心でした。
充電はUSBでできるため外出先でも電源に不安が無いのでおすすめです。
review_title: 一通りそろったグルーミング/トリマーセット

review_text:
私はこれまで、手動の鼻毛カッター、電動シェーバー、眉用はさみを使っていましたが、これ一つで、髭用シェーバー、髭トリマー、眉用シェーバー、鼻毛カッターの1台4役です。

個装箱は、茶色のパッケージに金色のイラストと4in1という文字、グルーミングキットという黒色の印刷、4種類のヘッドの形状がイラストされたものが記載されています。

中身は、本体に鼻毛カッターが装着され、カバーが付いた状態のものとその下に、充電用USB A>Cケーブル、掃除用ブラシが入っています。
その他に、髭シェーバー(普通の電動シェーバー)用ヘッド、眉毛シェーバーヘッド、髭トリマー用ヘッド、眉用アタッチメント2種、髭用アタッチメント及び充電台が入っています。

本体のカバーを外して、鼻毛カッター用ヘッドを、回転させて外し、必要なヘッドを付け替えれば、シェーバーやトリマーになります。
眉用のアタッチメントは、トリミングする際には長さ違いで2種類のアタッチメントを眉毛シェーバーヘッドに被せます。
髭用のアタッチメントは、髭トリマーに取り付けたのち、アタッチメントの片方を押すことで、11～14mmの任意のトリミングができるようになります。

充電台に本体を載せて、USBケーブルをつなぐ(5V/1A)と、本体ロゴの下にあるグリーンLEDが点滅して充電中であることを示します。
充電が完了すると点灯に変わり、3分/日のペースで1カ月充電無しで使うことができるそうです。

鼻毛カッターは、アタッチメントを回転させて外すと、切った毛が出てくるので、付属のブラシで、本体部分の清掃を行います。
髭シェーバーは、カバーが付いているので、カバーを外して髭を剃り、刃の横方向の付け根の左右にプッシュボタンがあるので、両方のボタンを押して外刃を外すことができるので、外して内刃/外刃を清掃します。
髭トリマーは、刃がむき出しなので、そのまま清掃します。
眉毛シェーバーは、刃の再度にスライドスイッチがあるので、下におろすと、刃の部分のカバーが外れるので、外して清掃します。
何れも、IPX8の防水仕様なので、本体ごと水洗いが可能なほか、浴室での利用も可能です。

動作音は、普段私が使っている電動シェーバーよりはるかに静かなので、深夜/早朝の利用であっても、家人に迷惑をかけることはないと思います。

ヘッドのバリエーションを写真に撮りました。
バリエーション-1は、カバーが付いた状態で充電台に乗せた状態、鼻毛カッター、ヘッドを外した状態です。
バリエーション-2は、髭シェーバーのカバーあり、カバー無しの状態です。
バリエーション-3は、髭トリマー、アタッチメントを付けた状態で最短にスライド、アタッチメントを付けた状態で最長にスライドさせた状態です。
バリエーション-4は、眉毛シェーバー、短いアタッチメントを付けた状態、長いアタッチメントを付けた状態です。

これだけ揃えば、朝の身だしなみは完璧です！
シェーバーは、皆さんがお持ちだと思いますが、なかなか単品で購入する機会のないツールなので、セットはありがたいと思います。

鼻毛カッターと眉毛カッターが欲しかったのでこちらの商品を選びました。
使った感想ですが回転が凄く早く鼻毛カッターは全く痛くなく着れます。
今まで使用していた乾電池式は回転数がおそいので比べ物になりません。
眉毛カッターはアタッチメントが付いているので簡単に切れました。
シェーバーはムダ毛そりに使用しております。
髭用のトリマーは昔、髭を生やしていた時とても大変な作業でしたが
これがあったら毎日簡単に髭の手入れができたと思いました。
充電スタンドも付いていて簡単に充電できるのがよいですね！

鼻毛カッターの他にヘッドを入れ替えて使えるマルチシェーバーです

鼻毛カッターがメインでそれ以外がオマケの様です
髭剃りは男性でも柔らかい毛は剃れませんでした

一つあると便利に使えそうです

防水機能付きのマルチグルーミングキットです。

まず、往復式のシェーバーアタッチメントが付いていて他とは一線を画します。
シェーバー機能はまずまず。ただヒゲの濃い方は期待しない方が良さそうです。

あとは鼻毛カッターや産毛処理、ヒゲのグルーミングなど男性が必要なアタッチメントがあるので、これ1本で十分。置くだけ充電も少しぐらつきはしますが、簡単でずぼらな私には重宝しています。

替え刃が継続的に販売されれば問題ないです。
review_title: 防水機能付きのマルチグルーミングキット

review_text:
しっかりと日常をサポートできる製品だと思います。
自分の場合、髭は硬いので本製品のシェーバーオプションだとちょっと厳しいかな。
出張や旅行ぐらいだったらいいけど常用はしんどそうです。
それ以外は十分だと思います。
何点はひとつ。収納ケースとかが付属してないんですよ。
製品が入っている箱にいつもいれておくんじゃ、携帯性がなくなるし、
せめて巾着袋でも用意してくれればよかったのに
review_title: カッチリとした製品です

review_text:
鼻毛カッター、髭シェーバーと眉毛シェーバーなどに使えるアタッチメントが4つ付いてこれ一つでほぼオッケーって感じです。
充電は刺す方が良かったかな。
もしくは磁石とかでくっついてくれるとか。
ぐらつくし、接触があまり良くなく、充電するのにストレスが溜まる。

ヘッド取替で４つの使い方があります。
鼻毛からもみあげまで、色々と使えて便利です。
review_title: ヘッド取替で４つの使い方があります。

review_text:
四つのアタッチメントが付いてます。
交換は簡単です。
耳毛は意外と手入れが難しいですがそのアタッチメントが付いてるのは有難いです。
音はそれなりにしますがうるさいほどではありません。
充電も専用台に載せて置くだけで始まります。
丸ごと洗えるので清潔さを保てます。

鼻毛カッターが欲しくて探してましたが、このメンズシェーバーセットを知り購入しました。
鼻毛だけでなく、ヘッドを交換すれば、シェーバーにも眉毛カッターにも変化する優れものです。
また、防水性能がしっかりしているので、水濡れの心配が無く、浴室での使用や直の水洗いが出来るのもうれしい内容です。
私は、本格的に使うというより洗面所において置いて、気になる剃り残しや長くなった眉毛を手軽に処理するのに使ってます。
この商品とはセット内容や仕様が別物ですが、以前使用していた鼻毛カッターは乾電池仕様で消費すれば交換が必要でしたが、この商品は充電タイプなので大変便利てす。
見た目もお洒落で、しっかりしていて長持ちしそうです。

かなり高級感があって良いです
つくりもかっちりしてて切れ味も申し分なくつかいやす。
置くだけの充電器だけど、これは普通にケーブルを挿すのでも良かったと思う。たぶん防水の兼ね合いだろうけど

正に俺のグルーミングセットという内容で太めのペンシル形本体にそれぞれのアタッチメント等をセットして利用します。鼻毛カッター、髭シェーバーと眉毛シェーバーにそれぞれのアタッチメントコームがあり、本体充電ドックに清掃用のブラシが同梱されており普通の男子には十分な内容と思われます。あえて改善点を上げるなら、充電ドックに本体をセットする時がちょっとぐらつきがあり、水平な場所に置かないと不安定で心配な事、また充実のセット内容で包装も良い感じでしたが、セットを収めておく専用ケースがほしいところです。アタッチメント交換はやや面倒ではありますが、良く考えられたセット内容で全体の統一感もありなかなかお洒落なグルーミングセットだと思います。★は上記の点でひとつ減らして４としました。
review_title: 俺のグルーミングセット！

The stainless steel T-blade is incredibly sharp and smooth, giving him clean lines and an even trim every time with no pulling or irritation. Very light weight and not loud at all!

He also loves that it’s cordless and waterproof, so it works just as well for quick dry trims as it does in the shower. The battery life is excellent, and the trimmer feels solid and high-quality in your hand definitely a premium product.

If you’re shopping for your husband or partner, this is a fantastic gift. He uses it regularly and always comments on how much better it performs than his old trimmers. Highly recommend for anyone serious about beard care! 👏✂️

review_text: The MANSCAPED Beard Hedger stopped being able to turn on after less than 2 years. During this time, I used the trimer twice a month with satisfactory results. I am giving a 2-star review because I believe 2 years is too short a lifespan for this product.

I bought this tool after reading a 2025 review of beard trimmers by Men’s Health. I have been using for a little over a month and would recommend against buying, for two reasons that were not addressed in the review that lead me to make this purchase.

1) The battery does not seem like it is going to last long. Often the motor wavers like the battery is about to die. It hasn’t died, but it also lives on the charger and I would expect the trimmer to act fresh and energetic when used for 5 minutes. Instead, I usually wonder if it has enough juice to last through the trim.

2) One of the features is using a single guard for all of the lengths. It works ok, but there are two clear drawbacks. One is that the comb is too far from the blade to stand up all the hairs even at the fairly short length of 2.5 (out of 10). The result is random long stragglers along the jawline, which are annoying to find later. I do lots of passes from multiple directions and they still surprise me. The second problem is the guard cannot trim under the nose, so I end up with an area the I cannot get with this trimmer, and have to get another trimmer or use small scissors.

I feel like this trimmer doesn’t really save me much time over my previous one and I would return it if I could. It is nice to not have multiple guards but the solution doesn’t address trimming needs for a short beard. Perhaps they will improve the guard and battery.

I recommend skipping this one. Hope this helps someone.

review_text:
The Beard Hedger is a well designed razor that brings convenience to my daily routine. After a few weeks of use, I can confidently say it gets the job done, but there are a couple of small problems that keep it from being perfect.

Pros:

The adjustable wheel is a great feature. It’s very easy to use and it eliminates the hassle of constantly swapping out different guards. This makes it great for shading your beard.

It’s cordless and waterproof, which makes it super convenient for wet use. I’ve used it in the shower a couple of times without issues. The build quality also feels very sturdy.

Cons:

While the motor works fine for regular maintenance, it struggles a bit with thicker facial hair. You may need to go over areas a few times for a truly even trim. I notice that if I don't shave regularly, the razor struggles cutting three to four weeks worth of hair in one go.

The battery life is decent but not outstanding. I expected a bit more longevity between charges for a trimmer at this price point.

Overall, I’m happy with the purchase. It performs well for most trimming needs. Just be aware that it is not a powerhouse for dense beards. Still, I’d recommend it to someone looking for a sleek and easy-to-use grooming tool.
review_title: Solid Razor with Great Features, Minor Room for Improvement

review_text: I mean, it cuts your hair but the lengths aren’t accurate. I have a normal beard with maybe 2.5-3” beard hair length, and the 7, 8, 9 length takes off way too much.

So I use a blade for a close shave. I have been wanting to shave when traveling and I can't always shave in the shower. I got a Braun cordless and it does a good job shaving, but can be tricky if I have been a week or more between shaves. That was the reason I purchased this beard trimmer. Leary of electric hair clippers near my throat and lips, I decided I would set the guard a distance from my skin and "sneak up" on my facial hair. The hair cut easily, no pulling or tugging and my throat and lips remained intact. Static caused the clippings to cover the trimmer, a problem I have seen on many electric hair clippers. Turns out these are able to be used in the shower so, no problem with cleaning up. I should mention that they are not noisy, and they have a USB "C" charge port, very nice. I'm very happy with my purchase.

However, after six months, the trimmer ceased to function. It exhibited an inability to power on, as if the internal motor were obstructed or lacked sufficient power to initiate its operation. Despite attempting cleaning and recharging, the trimmer remained unresponsive.
In retrospect, I anticipated a higher level of performance from a trimmer marketed as a premium product. While it served its purpose effectively during its operational period, its inability to function after six months has diminished my expectations.

Let me tell you about my journey with The Beard Hedger, the Swiss Army knife of facial hair management. This little beauty has transformed my beard care routine from "mountain man meets bird's nest" to "distinguished gentleman with a hint of rugged charm."

First off, the ergonomics are fantastic. It fits in your hand like a well-trained hamster - comfortable, precise, and unlikely to escape during critical grooming moments. The blades are sharp enough to make my previous trimmer weep with inadequacy, and the motor purrs like a content cat that's found the perfect sunbeam.

The waterproof feature is a game-changer. Now I can finally achieve my lifelong dream of trimming my beard while pretending to be Jacques Cousteau in the shower. "Ze magnificent facial hair must be maintained even in ze depths of ze bathroom!"

Clean-up is a breeze, which is ironic because using my old trimmer created enough loose hair to form several small tumbleweeds that would roll across my bathroom floor like I was staging a Western in my powder room.

However - and here's where we lose that fifth star - the maximum trim length is only 10mm. Yes, my fault for not reading the specs more carefully, but come on! Some of us want to maintain a beard that says "I could survive in the wilderness" without actually having to go there. For those aiming to channel their inner Gandalf, you might need to look elsewhere.

Despite this limitation, The Beard Hedger has earned its place in my grooming arsenal. It's reliable, efficient, and hasn't once tried to eat my face, which is more than I can say for some other trimmers I've owned.

Bottom line: If you're not trying to recreate ZZ Top's aesthetic, this is your tool. Just remember, 10mm is your ceiling - anything more and you'll need to either get creative with your trimming strategy or accept that you've outgrown the Hedger's hedging capabilities.

I thought they would make it harder, however, when my newly received Beard Hedger stopped working, all I was asked to do is send a video and they sent a replacement promptly.  Very happy.  I am sure the replacement will be fine.
review_title: Replaced Beard Hedger When It Stopped Working

review_text: Careful. This thing slashes my lips open if it so much as grazes them. Every. Time. I have learned my lesson. It's an ok beard trimmer, but one false move letting this thing touch my lips and it's mop–up time: put down the razor, break open the first aid kit, and spend the next several days looking handsome as a walking cold sore outbreak. This trimmer has a weight and feel that says "manly," but I shudder to think of how it's being advertised to fellas out there looking to use it below the belt! Yikes! No, thank you!

This is nothing special. It’s one of the most overpriced beard trimmers out there. It’s just their standard trimmer that has a cheap plastic adjustment guide on it that they charge you significantly more for. It will work just fine but I recommend saving your money and buying any other trimmer and guide for a much better price, or at least one that is actually worth the money and not made of cheap materials.
It stopped charging suddenly, I am very surprised as I’ve a good experience with other manscape products.
have not had this long enough to from a opinion

I use this 1-2x per week for 9 months. Initially this would cut me if I went straight at the skin, as it should. Now it does not.
  The charge lasts long enough for me.
  The dial makes changes very easy. Much better than trading out plastic depth gauges.

This is my second Beard Hedger.  The first one I had for about a year and a half and was totally satisfied with the performance.  Then for some reason the off/on switch failed.  And it only failed periodically, so it was no longer reliable.  Keeping my fingers crossed that I don't have the same issues with this one.
Can cut the skin around the lips also over cuts beard to short.

I paid a premium for this and it didn't make it 2 years. I used it about once a week to trim my beard and like that it's adjustable but come on, for this price point, this should have lasted 5 years like all the cheaper ones I've purchased in the past. BTW, I also purchased the nose hair trimmer and the problem with it was that it's ineffective. Very disappointed in Manscaped.

very nice trimmer for when you want a longer length, but recently I’ve been trimming my beard shorter and the one side of the trimmer will always cut my face. Happens every time. I’ve inspected the product multiple times to see if something is broken. I’ve never dropped it. Zero damage has happened to this item, but when it’s just the trimmer without fail it will always cut me. Sadly I didn’t find this out until after its return date allowance because I don’t normally trim my beard this short.
review_title: One side of trimmer always cuts my face

review_text:
I want to start this review off with i have used the lawnmower for years and multiple generations of it as well. I absolutely love the Lawnmower. With that, this product is not at all what I wanted for a beard trimmer from this company.

My biggest flaw with this product really comes down to poor design. The odd design of this trimmer just doesn't work for me. Every other trimmer i have ever owned has felt natural in my hand and when approaching my face. Not this one. My brian couldn't compute with the backwards awkward design, and when putting a moving blade on your face, you should be confident in it's abilities.

The second thing is value. After doing a more in depth dive of trimmers in the same price range, I found a few products in the $100 price range that really put this trimmer in the $50-$60 price range. While the packaging is nice and the travel case is REALLY nice, that just doesn't sell me on this product.

Lastly, the built in adjustable guard seems like a great idea, but it is not new technology nor is it well executed. When you adjust the guard past the lowest setting and apply a little bit of pressure to the guard it flexes. I have never had that issue with an adjustable or fixed guard on a trimmer that I've owned. This is a major design flaw that should be address immediately.

I ended up returning after 1 use and because I don't see myself getting past the awkward design. I ended up purchasing the Brio BreadScape V2 and am much happier with the build quality, better battery life and fixed guard.
review_title: Not the best product from ManScaped

review_text: Went to charge item for just the second time, we'll not charge. Tried several times over 3 days no success.

After trying many different types of shaver, this one is one of the best I’ve ever used
We’ll made better than most of the cheap crap out there

Nice variety of length adjustments but the charging port is poorly made and no longer connects to the cable. Lasted less than a year which isn’t acceptable at this price point. I’ll try a different brand next.

Bought this looking for something new to replace my Conner iStubble I've had for YEARS. This product must spend all its money on advertising and not R&D. It doesn't work very well, and it almost feels like you're going to break it when interchanging the attachments. I'm going to be returning this product. It's way too expensive to 1. be this cheap feeling and 2. not work well. Don't get me wrong, it works OK but not well and definitely not for the price.

I am not very happy with the comb and length control l. I find it cumbersome and less effective than separate combs that are sized in inches.

review_text: I have purchased this beard trimmer twice. After my first one stopped working, I thought it was just a dud. The second one just stopped working again. For the amount of money you are spending, there are PLENTY of better options that are much cheaper.

Manscaper works great. Only thing of caution is that there is a “travel lock” that I was unaware of that when triggered has to be turned off by pressing the power switch on and off 3 times. Very frustrating if unaware.

Overall, I would say this trimmer is decent. The adjustable guard is nice and cuts through hair with ease. The downfall is the blade gets very hot to the touch after a couple minutes. It makes trimming the neck line difficult. I will be returning the trimmer and looking for something else in this price range.

I like this shaver. The build quality is nice and the battery last a long time for me at least. The one thing I had an issue with was the gearbox beneath the head of the razer had a too much lubricant. This caused my beard hair to clump to the lubricant and slow down the motor significantly. After disassembling the head and washing the lubricant off, it functions much better. I get that the lubricant is there to help but it did not help me unfortunately. I will say though, I appreciate that disassembly and reassembly was fairly simple.
review_title: Good product but it's a bit overpriced

review_text: It seems to generally work well, but the plastic guard is too big to trim near the nose. I have to trim the center of my mustache with scissors.

Such an inconsistent cut if I’m using anything shorter than 3mm. Super short on my neck but long on my chin and short on my jaw but long on my cheeks. Find myself having to use my old trimmer to clean up. Disappointing
review_title: Doesn’t work well for short lengths

review_text:
Took multiple passes to trim my beard in one spot. Longest setting (10mm) takes me about a week to grow. Charged it for 2 days before using it, and still started to die about halfway through and couldn't handle my beard.

But hey, it looks good I guess. I'll be returning it.
With attachment, this trimmer does not cut as close as I prefer.
The shave is nice however given the size of the cap you dont really reach the bit below the nose.

I don't love it. I was using a trimmer my ex GF had bought for her dog and never used. That thing could cut! This is weak compared to that. I do like the adjustable length dial. Its accurate and easy to use. But I don't like how if you remove that part to try to use just the clipper part to say, clean up your neck line. It doesnt work.
I can't return it, because I used it. But i doubt Ill buy any other manscaped products.

I expected a lot more out of this trimmer for the price. I really should have went with a different option. Does not adjust for any real length. I can grow in one month what the longest setting on this trimmer cuts at. Highly disappointed.
A few gripes, it's a little large for a beard trimmer it's more like a barber tool used for lining. The shears are a little pokey and could be a little more narrow. It does cut well.

I've been using this trimmer in tandem with a Norelco 7000 series since June 2023.  My Manscaped trimmer no longer holds a sufficient charge to use more than 3-5 minutes and struggles to cut due to dull blades.  I'd say this trimmer works at around 10% based off of being 100% at time of purchase where my Norelco is still around 70% (in my opinion based on my own personal use and attempt to use them equally over time).

Now I am not saying it's not a good trimmer or leaving a bad review. I am making a comparison based on value for your money against my personal best choice in a similar range.
Overpriced for an average product.
It's a good trimmer but the battery stopped taking a charge after 8 months of twice-per-week use. Refuses to charge.
review_title: Good but battery stopped taking charge.

review_text:
I initially had a great experience with the Beard Hedge trimmer, which I purchased in March. The trimmer was effective and easy to use, and I was quite satisfied with its performance during the first few months.

However, after less than 5 months of minimal use, the trimmer unexpectedly stopped working. I used it fewer than ten times and only needed to charge it twice. Now, it no longer turns on or shows any signs of charging when plugged in.
The trimmer was never dropped, exposed to harmful chemicals, or subjected to any form of damage. In fact, despite being advertised as waterproof, I rarely exposed it to water.

Given the short lifespan of this product, I'm disappointed and cannot recommend it. I would have expected a much longer period of reliable use, especially for a product at this price point.
review_title: Disappointing Durability - Stopped Working After 5 Months

review_text: This was too bulky to use.  I wasn’t able to get a close and consistent cut. It’s light weight and does not feel like a high quality item in your hand, which I expected based on the price. I went back to my Philips.

I don't know what everyone's raving about, I find this gives me a really uneven shave when maintaining a 1/2" beard, and it has a REALLY hard time cutting my curlier, stiffer white hairs. I missed the return window so I'm stuck with it, but right now this is a pass for me.
review_title: Uneven shave, can't handle curly hair so well

review_text:
The product has performed as expected for the price.  I am satisfied with the face trim results…although the 0.5 setting does produce some slight variation, which is likely present on other length settings but is most noticeable on the shortest (0.5).

The case looks and feels nice.  However the zipper broke the first week.  I would greatly appreciate a replacement case!

I wouldn’t say that I’m a hairy man, but the body hair that I do have is CURLY. This manscaper does a fine job of straightening my hair before cutting, leaving a nice, even length. It’s only draw back is it’s rather clunky size.

Be careful, .5 looks like some peoples 5 o’clock shadow. However, it also let it cut my lip while trimming.

Side by side to my old trimmer, realized my old one is closer to a 1.5 with just the guard.  At 1.5 it did not cut my lip anymore.

It is great having so many increments to choose the desired length. Unfortunately the guard does keep it from getting right at your nose. A very quick snip with small scissors will get that spot.

That said, it took 2-3 passes to trim max. Very fast and wider area at a pass it seemed. So overall happy. Much faster than several other brands and styles of beard trimmers I’ve had in the past.

My old trimmer was an old cheaper brand that just broke but had for many years replaced it with the manscape and thought it would be better by the hype I seen on it but not that good hair gets caught in guard and stops cutting evenly when that happens unless I'm using it wrong not very impressed

I've been using manscape machines for a few years now. I was looking forward to this machine, and after a few months of usage I can tell you that it's just not as good as it can be. It's got great battery life. It trims fast, I really don't spend more than 10 minutes trimming. But the big issue I have, is the inconsistency when choosing which level to use to cut. If I use 3/3.0, it cuts certain areas of my beard evenly. But if I get to other certain parts, it sometimes cuts well, other times it cuts less than it should or more than it should.

The machine can easily be one of the very best, I think it simply needs a few minor modifications and the next model will be great. But that's also the issue. Why are we constantly having to buy a new model. Why can't the current model be the absolute best?

It's disappointing and surprising to realize the pattern that the company is following after also noticing the drastic drop in battery life from my other manscape machine, the lawnmower.

Alas, I hope I'm just a one off. And I hope others have a better experience. But based on the two manscape products I have, I can't say that I'm looking forward to the next machine they release.

上アタッチメントの先と下アタッチメントの間にバリカン歯があるのはトリマーとして構造的に間違っている。
例えば2㎜で髭をカットするためにアタッチメントを2㎜だして肌に当てると、肌は押し当てればへこむので写真の親指の腹のようにアタッチメント間でバリカン歯に肌（ヒゲ）が近づき、ほぼ0㎜でカットされる。
だったら肌がへこむ分、アタッチメントを出して使えばいいかと思いきや、今度は口ひげなどの平面的な部分は長くトリミングされ、顎先など角度のある部分は短くトリミングされる
切れ味自体は良い、鼻毛カッターもギリ使える（短いので小さいハサミの方が奥まで切れる）
髭ラインを整えたりするにはよさそうだが、長さを調整するトリマーとしては使えません

ただ、もう少しの駆動時間が長ければ、嬉しいです。

ブラウンの同種商品のバッテリーがヘタってしまったので買い替えです。

買い替え前の商品と比較しても、動作音は静かで、切れ味も申し分なし。

ダイヤルやスイッチの部分の質感や操作感は、写真で見るよりいかにもプラスチックという感じでチープなのが残念。

あと動作中はダイヤルにロックがかかるようで、電源つけっぱなしでは長さ変更ができません。買い替え前は電源入れた状態でカチカチと長さを変更しながらヒゲを整えてたので、これができないのが残念。

価格からすると、総じて悪くはないですが、期待は超えてこなかったという感じです。

review_text: My husband thought this was going to be cheap because it looks a bit cheap but he was pleasantly surprised at how great this ended up being.
Holds a charge for quite a while and cuts well!

This kit came with separate heads, allowing me to easily switch between trimming different areas of my face. Whether I needed to tidy up my nose hair, shape my mustache, trim my beard, or groom my eyebrows, this all-in-one device had me covered.

Using the trimmer was a breeze. The separate heads were easy to attach and detach, providing a hassle-free transition between different grooming tasks. The trimmer's design was ergonomic and comfortable to hold, allowing for precise control and maneuverability.

I was impressed with the performance of the trimmer. The blades were sharp and efficient, effortlessly trimming and shaping my facial hair with ease. It provided a clean and precise trim, allowing me to achieve the desired look with minimal effort.

The trimmer was also easy to clean. The detachable heads could be rinsed under running water, ensuring hygienic maintenance and prolonging the life of the device.

Overall, I had a positive experience with this trimmer. Its multifunctionality and separate heads for each grooming task made it a versatile and convenient tool. Whether I needed to trim my nose hair, shape my mustache, groom my beard, or tidy up my eyebrows, this kit had everything I needed.

Pretty good, comes with many attachments.  I do wish the charger plugged right into the clipper, rather than having a charging base, since we keep it in a travel bag.  My only other complaint is that the foil shaver doesn't shave very close, but this seems to be typical of most foil shavers.  Other than that it works perfectly, and is convenient to keep in the car.

I got this for my husband and he was pretty happy with it. It works well and comes with different attachments for nose trimming, eyebrows, mustache etc.  It also can charge with a usb so no need for batteries. Overall a nice trimming tool

Before I talk about the actual device, I want to mention that this charges with a USB C cable, which is the current standard.  I have another grooming device that has a proprietary cable which I already misplaced rendering the other product useless until I find the cable.  USB C is the standard and the Urbaner uses it.  You can also plug the cable into the base and set the trimmer on the base to charge.

The previous generation of trimmers used a replaceable battery.  This one with the rechargeable battery is so much nicer.

There is a nice selection of attachments that are easy to swap out and attach securely.

The brush is double-ended to ensure you can clean out the attachments.
Came well packed looks pretty professional everything is exactly as advertised by the seller

This set comes in a nice, giftable box. The trimmer looks chic and has a good weight to it. It is simple, yet comfortable to use. The charging base gives a luxurious look to the trimmer, but in practice it would probably be more convenient if the trimmer had a USB connector to be used with a standard charger. One of the best aspects of this set is that it has a good variety of heads. The mesh head is not a common one that you can find in all trimmer sets. The trimmer is relatively quiet and works well. On the down side, the mechanical parts are all plastic and upon close inspection look flimsy. When I removed the nose clipper the second time, it came out in two pieces. Perhaps it is separable to make it easier to clean, but I don’t have time to put the two pieces together every time I change the head. At $55, this set is way too expensive in its class.

I am split between 3 and 4 stars. This is not as good as some of the 4-star trimmers, but it is better than some of the 3-star trimmers I reviewed. At the end of the day, a 4-star product is something that is not perfect but I would buy. This is something that is not bad, but I would not buy, especially at this price. Hence 3 stars.
review_title: Some good, some not so good features

review_text: This hair grooming has everything you need to keep you face beautiful. From eyebrows to beard. Also it’s cordless, rechargeable and stylish. My husband loves it. It make a great gift for Father’s Day , birthdays or any way you would like to celebrate the man in your life.

The Urbaner Facial Hair Grooming Kit is a good, well-made product but would not be my first choice if considering buying another kit of the same type.

At the cost of $54.99, it’s a good trimmer but doesn’t have the features that I personally prefer in my trimmers.  That being said, here are the Pros/Cons on the features of this product:

Pros:
* Product is waterproof.
* Product is cordless.
* Takes 90 minutes to charge on a USB-C connection for a 90 minute usage time.
* Can plug straight into device or use a charging stand (included).
* Trimmer head is removable and washable.
* Includes various items needed for full facial trimming – nose hair clipper, mustache trimmer, beard trimmer and eyebrow trimmer.
* Comes with a Cleaning Brush.
* Simple to operate.
* Does job as intended with no nicks, cuts or irritation.

Cons:
* Has no carrying case. Products like this should always include one because attachments could be easily lost.
* Cannot tell when device is about to lose battery charge.
* Item doesn’t say what RPM the motor has but seems on the low side.
review_title: Low RPM And No Carrying Case But Otherwise A Good Trimmer

review_text: I found the trimmer to work well trimming my mustache, nose and facial hair.  The shaver comes with a charging base and USB cable to allow it to be connected to a USB-C charging adapter (not included).  It isn’t obvious how to change the head pieces, so make sure and read the instructions.  I would have liked this to come with an AC adapter that would be suitable to use near a bathroom sink so that the trimmer could stay charged and ready for use.  I don’t have a suitable AC adapter in my bathroom.  The charging base is nice and heavy.

This cordless rechargeable grooming kit comes with a decent variety of attachments.  Among these are a nose/ear hair trimmer head, an adjustable (5 length) comb head, a blade foil shaver, a precision trimming head, and a couple two-position guide comb attachments for eyebrows, etc.  They also include a nice weighted charging base, a USB-C charging cord, and a cleaning brush.  The set comes very nicely boxed with everything in its place.  The box design would make this a nice giftset for sure.

After trying out the attachments I’m finding that the nose/ear hair trimmer works fairly well.  The foil blade shaver I found to be rather inefficient.  I kept going over small hairs again and again, and it just didn’t cut them.  The precision head worked well and I was able to trim my neck and get a well-defined edge.  The adjustable comb attachments were good.  The shortest setting seemed to give me the close but rugged short-beard look that I like.  The eyebrow attachments didn’t really do anything, but that’s probably because my eyebrows aren’t that long.

The weight of the device is good, and it is easy to hold and operate.  Some of the attachments come apart for cleaning, so that’s a plus.  The vibration and noise level of the shaver is a little annoying.  It’s much louder than I expected.

It’s a decent set and a nice grooming kit.  I think it would make a nice gift for someone, and overall, I think it’s decent quality.  Not all of the attachments worked well for me, but the ones that did seemed to perform well.
review_title: Decent Assortment of Attachments – Easy to Use

review_text: I really like this facial hair grooming kit.  It is small but powerful - the shaver removes even thicker grey facial hair.  It comes with everything you would possibly need for facial grooming - easily gets in and around smaller areas.  The charging stand is a plus.  The kit comes beautifully packaged - this would make a really nice gift.

I bought a ton of these kind of things over my lifetime and most of them are cheap garbage. I was really not expecting a whole lot from these. But I was pleasantly surprised. The main trimmer performs very well and while the motor isn’t exactly strong it’s not as weak as the ones that use a single AA battery. It’s performed relatively well and consistently. It doesn’t seem to get hung up as much as the battery powered ones. I love the fact that this one charges by USB. A few of the other attachments are useful as well. The precision eyebrow trimmer and sideburn clippers work surprisingly well. Not as well as my one blade but they will do A respectable job.

I haven’t really tried the foil head because I don’t really have a use for it I don’t expect it to replace a shaver of that type.

I said like this really needs to come with a custom fitted zip up case. Especially this price and it doesn’t so you’re liable to lose the accessories unless you keep them in the cardboard box which is really quite bulky. The charging stand is nice and has a good weight to it but the trimmer is so easily knocked off of the charger you really have to be careful. I think I would’ve preferred a straight plug and cable to the unit.

Still overall I was pleasantly surprised. It doesn’t have any of the gimmicks like a LED light or anything but it does a good job for what it’s supposed to do.

But the price, the price is a little steep for what you get. Especially because you don’t get a case. I’m sure there are trimmers just as good at half of the price. But then again there are also many trimmers available that are just simple wastes of money. So at least when you buy this when you know you’re getting something that will work. I do believe the lithium ion battery has a little more power than the battery operated one so I would at least look for a rechargeable one if you search for something cheaper.

review_text:

Then you do not have to bring the USB-C or charging dock on your travels, and you can leave behind any attachments that aren’t crucial to your trip. Just make sure to reserve enough time for the initial charge.

Although it looks fancy, I don’t have any feelings about the charging dock. It’s a nice touch but I would have loved to have a USB wall plug and storage case, especially for a set at this price point.

review_text:
I'm fairly ambivalent about this kit. It's cute enough, but ultimately it's underpowered for the features it attempts to provide. You have a low-powered motor with a variety of twist-on attachments. The motor is fine for nose hair removal. But the other attachments, which are supposed to remove body hair/trim are severely underpowered and inefficient.

The device is small enough that it's easy to maneuver in your hand, and that might be a plus if you're attempting to use this for very fine detail body grooming. It's reasonable for trimming back eyebrows, for example. But good luck removing any subtantial growth of hair with this: It's slow, and tends to get bogged down. Using it to clean up sideburns was not much fun, for example.

In the kit you get:

** Motorized device with interchangable heads
** Nose hair removal head
** Small clipper head with length guard
** Right angle clipper head with length guards
** Foil shaver head
** Nice weighted charging stand
** USB charging cable

Of these, the nose hair removal head and the right angle clipper head (useful for eyebrows) are probably the two of value. The foil shaver is pretty pointless and the small clipper head isn't that great, either.

Overall, given the price, I am not sure I'd recommend this over a more powerful clipper with replacement heads and a nose hair clipper. But if you like the aesthetics of the small size, you may find this appealing.

Pros:
** Nose hair remover works fine
** Easy to maneuver for eyebrow trimming
** Heads easy to swap
** The charging stand is weighted and stable

Cons:
** Not that powerful
** Mini clipper and foil shaver not that useful
** Pricey compared to other options

Overall it's a good value set. I highly recommend it.

review_title: 2mmのアタッチメントは付属していません。

review_text:
MGK5410型を某Yショッピングにて購入。
MGK5420とはアタッチメントの一つが1mm違うだけなので、
誰かの為になればと思いレビューを残しておく。

結論から先に述べてしまおう。
所詮オールインワンは｢単品買い｣には勝てない。
どうしても一つに済ませたい！という事でなければ、
三つ四つ分けて買った方が満足感も効果も高い。

▼アタッチメント
まず大前提として、
この商品は本体とアタッチメントから成る。
何かを使うときにはアタッチメントを付け替える。
これが実際に商品を購入すると実感が湧くだろう。

つまり、鼻毛カッターなら鼻毛用、
ボディに使うなら通常刃と保護パーツ、
ヒゲならヒゲ用パーツ、というように毎回だ。

ボタンでワンタッチ、ではなく、
差し込み式なので、抜く時はグイッと引っ張る。
当然洗う時も乾かす時もオイルを差す時も、
衛生的には外した方が良いということだろう。
使う用途が多ければ多いほど、大変な作業である。

また、旅行に便利かと思いきや、
それだけアタッチメントも運ばないといけない。
ポーチがかさばる点も要考慮である。

▼鼻毛カッター
よほど鼻毛が飛び出ている人でなければ
まるで役に立たない代物ではないだろうか。
実際にカットしているのはおそらくウワ面のみ、
横側は全く何の役にも立っていない。
つまりドンピシャで毛先を刃に当てないと意味がない。

加えて、ガワから内部の刃までの距離が遠く、
短い毛では物理的に届かない気さえしてしまう。
あまりにも剃れなかったので、
本当に動作しているか体毛一本で試してみたが、
これを刈り取る事すらも苦戦する始末であった。

ちなみに某パ社の定番モデルでは限界値は書かれていないが、
当商品は5mm以上深く鼻に入れてはいけないらしい。
「5mm」がどれだけ短いかをメジャーで見てみてほしい。

当然、毛くず吸引なんて機能も搭載されていない。

後から知ったことだが、某パ社のカッターは、
｢0.5mm以下の毛は切れない可能性が～｣とある。
という事は1mm程度の毛なら平気で切れるという事。
このなんちゃってカッターでは勝負にならない。
もちろんあちらは横方向にも対応しているし、日本製の刃だ。

▼ボディ
肌保護アタッチメントは確かに保護はしてくれるが
どこが剃れているのか?というくらい永遠に時間が掛かる。
何mmに揃うのかは公表されていないが、
おそらくこれでツルツルは不可能だろう。

と、ここからは実験に移る(メーカー非推奨。)

次に試したのはシェービング用ヘッド。
紹介写真ではツルツルの顎が掲載されているモノ。
これならば間違いないだろうと思ったが、
今度は細かい毛くずではなく、
角質のような粉がアタッチメントに付着した。
皮膚が削れてるんじゃ…と思い中止。

肌保護ヘッドよりかはマシだったが、
依然としてかなり時間が掛かるのは事実。
見た目よりも実際に剃れる面積が少ない。
鼻毛カッターのガワと同じく、
剃れない場所(刃がないゾーン)が多いのだ。

ならば、と思いイージーコーム1mmで決行。
これは「剃った翌日にポツポツ生えてきた」
くらいの長さまでしか揃えられなかった。

某海外P社のボディトリマーは0.5mmのアタッチメント。
両側から剃れるタイプなので剃り残しも少ない。
もちろん、ボディ用なので怪我はしないし、
0.5mmなので今回試したどれよりもツルツルになる。
0.5mmと1mmではたった0.5mmの差であるが、
ここまで違うものなのかと驚く。

さて、今回の無謀なトライの仮定で、
僅かに皮膚を切ってしまったのでここで中止。
安全に行こうとするとほとんど剃れず、
他のヘッドで無理をすると怪我をする事が分かった。

▼ヒゲや髪、その他
ボディ用と鼻毛カッターが使えない時点で、
ヒゲだけ使えても当方にはまるで意味がない。
試す意味もないのでここらへんはスルーした。
仮に、ヒゲ剃りがまともだとしても、
ヒゲ剃りのフィールドではシェーバーには勝てない。
かといってヒゲの長さをただ揃えたい人には、
無能な他のアタッチメントは邪魔(コスト増)になる。

二兎を追う者は一兎をも得ず。

という事でこの商品は子供の頭を刈りたい、
というような用途でなければオススメできない。
もしこの商品が初めて買う剃り機であれば、
高評価してしまう人もいるかもしれない。

ただ、他のボディトリマーや鼻毛カッター、
髭剃りを購入したことがあるなら期待は厳禁だ。
同様の性能・効果は絶対に得られないだろう。

そもそもこの価格帯で9つを兼ねる、
という売り文句に疑問に思った方がいい。
バリカン以外はオマケ(プラスチックパーツ)だから実現可能である。

某パ社のまともな鼻毛カッターだけで、
こちらの商品と同じくらいの値段がする。
廉価帯のヒゲ剃りでも5～8,000円はしているし、
ボディトリマーも格安品を除けば4～6,000円くらいだ。
6,000円で全て手に入るわけがないのだ。
(6,000/9=666円とまでは言わないが...)

なんだか多機能ばかり追っていた
昔の日本企業精神みたいに感じられる。

ドイツ設計の刃と書かれているが、
ドイツ製造とは書かれていないし多分中国製だろう。
EU圏にも関わらず充電も未だに専用ケーブル/コンセント式。
なんだかあれこれ欲張って失敗している気がしないでもない。

いい商品であること
購入前からわかっていたが
調整が2mmしか出来ない事
1mmはアタッチメント取り替えないといけないこと

どうしても以前のものと比較してしまいますが慣れるしかないですね

Having tried a variety of grooming products over the years, I must say that the Braun Multi-Groomer Series 5 MGK5420 is a solid contender in the world of men's grooming. This all-in-one kit manages to combine practicality and performance in a sleek, ergonomic design.

Versatility:
First off, its versatility is truly commendable. Whether you're looking to trim your beard, clip your hair, or even manage your nose hairs—this device has got you covered. The multiple attachments are not only user-friendly but also swap in and out with ease.

Performance:
The AutoSensing Technology is a game-changer. It automatically adapts to the thickness of your hair, providing a more efficient and even trim. Gone are the days of awkward patches and inconsistent lengths!

Battery Life:
Another standout feature is the lithium-ion battery. With up to 100 minutes of runtime on a full charge, you won't find yourself in a situation where the device dies halfway through your grooming session. The LED battery indicator is a convenient addition, letting you know when it's time for a charge.

Ease of Maintenance:
Being waterproof, cleaning this device is a breeze. Just run it under the tap, and you're good to go. This feature is a time-saver and adds to the overall durability of the device.

Drawbacks:
No product is without its downsides. The Multi-Groomer Series 5 MGK5420 is a bit on the expensive side. If you're someone who's looking for a basic trimmer, this might be overkill for your needs. Additionally, some users may find the device a bit bulky, particularly when using the smaller attachments for precision tasks.

Conclusion:
All in all, the Braun Multi-Groomer Series 5 MGK5420 offers a robust and versatile grooming experience. While it may be a bit pricey, the range of features and ease of use make it a worthwhile investment for those who take their grooming seriously. It’s not just a razor; it’s a comprehensive grooming solution.

ベスト3に入るくらい気に入ってます！基本的に2.5〜3.5mmの範囲で顎髭を整えるのみ。1回2〜5分で週3回くらいの頻度で、夜にお風呂場で使用。2月に購入したので半年くらい経ちますが、使用開始時に1回充電したきりでまだ充電切れしていないです。これまで、ドンキやAmazonで2000円〜3000円くらいのトリマーを購入してきましたが、仕事で顎髭がOKになり、完全防水のお風呂場で使えるものが欲しくなったため、セールになっていたタイミングで購入しました。これまで、様々なトリマーを試しましたが、3000円くらいのものはすぐに壊れてしまったり、電池式のものはパワーが弱かったりでなかなか良いものがありませんでした。また、上述したように顎髭のみなので高価なメーカー品まで必要じゃないだろうと躊躇してたというのもあります。
実際に購入して使ってみたら、想像していた以上に素晴らしく、特に充電はもちろんのことお手入れほぼ不要。切れ味もよく、洗いっぱなしで軽く本体を拭いたらそのまま所定の置き場に放置してるくらいです。
ひげの長さを調節するアジャスターもつけっぱなし。安いものだとアジャスターを付け替える必要がありますが、手元のダイヤルで長さが調整できるのも楽でいいです。
自分が購入したのは、たぶんシリーズの中でも一番ランクが低いもので、充電スタンドなどもついていませんが、これだけ充電が長持ちしますし、他の使い方はしないので、むしろこの必要最低限のセットで充分でした。
最近は低価格で色々あるものの、こういうものはやはりメーカー品に限るなぁと思いました！

信頼出来る

●使いやすさとデザイン
この髭剃りを購入したのは、夫の髭を整えるためでしたが、操作が簡単で驚きました。髭を4mmの長さに整えると、見違えるほど整った印象になります。また、LEDライトで充電状況を確認できるので便利です。ただ、再充電時には注意が必要です。

●多機能性
この製品は髭剃りだけでなく、頭を丸める際にも使える多機能さがあります。付属のアタッチメントを使うことで、いろいろな長さに調整できる点が評価ポイントです。

●切れ味とメンテナンス
切れ味も良く、髭や髪をスムーズにカットできるのが嬉しいところです。しかし、使用後の毛が飛び散りやすくて掃除が少し面倒なので、使用環境に工夫が必要かもしれません。

★総評
全体としてのコストパフォーマンスはいまいちですが、信頼できるメーカー製ということで耐久性にも期待が持てます。髭や髪のお手入れをより簡単に、手軽にしたい方にはおすすめの一台です。

一度返却して確認頂くと正常な動作とのことでした。つまり充電満了に近い状態でも充電完了目安の時間まで過充電状態になり内臓電池寿命が短くなるので要注意です。（メーカー設計意図とのこと）

review_text:
先人のレビューを信用し『丸刈り坊主』『ヒゲ』兼用として購入。かなりいいです！

お風呂対応なので何のためらいもなく入浴ついでに刈れます。そして『停めて洗って再開』がすぐできます。これすごい時短だし楽です。コームの下がガバッと開いているので刈った毛はすぐ流れるし水分も乾きやすいです。長さ調節も頑丈にできています。多少押し込んでも、コームを脱着しても動きません。『刈りすぎ事故』が起こりません。

小さく軽いので取り回しやすいです。耳まわり・襟足の刈り残しが激減！。1～2cm以上伸びた長い毛は刈りにくいようで、コーム内の長さでせめて週1以上は手入れする人向け。

付属のポーチには各アタッチメントも電源も全部入ります。これなら旅行も余裕です。なんと長押しで電源ロック機能まで付いてます。

今までは2㎜単位で刈高を変えれる普通のバリカンで髭を刈っていましたが、刃や本体の大きさからバラつきや刈残しがありました。この製品は専用品だけあってシェーバー感覚で使いやすく、バラつきや刈残しは最小限になりました。一部分に残っただけならそこをもう一度刈るだけなので、ストレスなく使えます。刈ってる時の毛詰まりも起こりにくく、耳をガードしながら刈ってくれる形状なのも良かった。また、本製品の0.5mm単位の刈高調整は、調整しやすく割と正確に機能します。
本製品も交換刃の種類を絞ったお得版の構成ですが、いっそのこと標準刃だけの安価版があればそちらを買ったと思います。普通のバリカンに比べると、やや割高に思ってしまうので。ちなみに、髪の毛は普通のバリカンの方が早いし使いやすいです。一方、耳の周りとか細部の補助の用途には本製品が使い易い。

I’ve been using the OLOV beard trimmer for a couple of weeks, mainly for beard maintenance and light body grooming. Overall, it delivers solid performance for the price point.

Performance & Power:
The motor feels strong enough to cut through thicker beard hair without pulling. It trims evenly and doesn’t snag, which is important for sensitive areas. The blades seem sharp and precise, especially for edging and shaping.

Attachments & Versatility:
The variety of guard sizes is a big plus. It makes it easy to switch between different lengths and styles. The included attachments feel lightweight but functional. For everyday grooming needs, the set is quite complete.

Battery & Charging:
Battery life has been good so far. A full charge lasts multiple grooming sessions. The digital display is helpful for monitoring battery percentage.

Things to consider:
 • The plastic guards feel slightly less durable compared to premium brands.
 • It’s not the quietest trimmer — noticeable motor sound during use.
 • For very coarse or dense hair, you may need to go over the same area twice.

Overall, this is a practical and versatile grooming kit that performs well for regular maintenance. While it may not replace high-end professional tools, it offers strong value and reliable results for home use.
review_title: Versatile trimmer with strong performance, minor limitations

**Overview:**
I recently received this beard trimmer and was initially impressed by its well-made appearance and the nice packaging.

**Experience:**
Upon unboxing the trimmer, I gave it a full charge overnight and eagerly awaited using it the next morning. Unfortunately, I encountered issues with changing the blade. The instructions mentioned pulling the blade off the razor, which seemed odd and difficult. After some struggle, I managed to remove the blade and attach a different one. However, the process was cumbersome.

The real trouble began when I attempted to remove the second blade. The top of the blade broke off in the process.

**Pros:**
- Well-made appearance
- Nice packaging

**Cons:**
- Difficult and awkward blade removal process
- Blade broke during removal

**Specific Example:**
The blade removal process as per the instructions is cumbersome and led to the blade breaking, which was quite disappointing.

**Conclusion:**
Due to the issues with the blade removal and the fact that it broke, I had to schedule a return. I would suggest reworking the product design to include a button for easier blade removal rather than having to pull it off. Unfortunately, I cannot recommend this product in its current state.

The OLOV For Man Beard Trimmer is effective and provides a clean cut, but it’s a bit too sharp, so you need to be careful when using it. I canny see how this product could be used by anyone with facial hair let alon used for trimming your hair on your scalp. Perhaps I just have thicker hair than most, and maybe for thinner haired people it works great. But not me. It probably ended up cutting about 75 percent of the hair on my face and neck, which ended up looking patchy and unprofessional, which in my line of work is unacceptable. I am giving two stars exclusively because some hair was cut I guess, but I ended up using a razor after anyway.

Been hesitant to pull the trigger on an item called “Ufree”, but that was “stoopit.”  Some comments made me “ascared” so I backed off for quite a while.  Ended up finally buying this trimmer on pre-Xmas sale along with the 2 year warranty-just in case.  Turns out, per usual, some commenters are just wrong.

Previously I’ve been using the Remington Body Groomer (hereafter RBG) for many years now, for everything.  It has a rare extendable body that’s great for reach, but the battery is suspect as it had to be replaced with a new unit early on 6-7 years ago.  I see it’s dying now, so I had to find its successor before actual death.  Definitely not going Remington again, so in steps this Ufree.  It is a worthy successor!  I’ve seen similar high quality cutters used by the stylists when I used to go for haircuts.

I’ve used this Ufree 7 weeks now, although only about twice a week to trim a goatee and shave the stubble down around it.  All I need it for.  It arrived charged @ 100% in mid-Dec, and I just dropped to 60% yesterday, so battery life is as advertised.  It is way sturdier, solid, and metal compared to the plastic RBG.  The heavier weight is a pleasure in hand and the cutting is way superior.  In fact, the comments that held me up mentioned pulling hair when used directly on skin.  Nope.  Wrong.  Just glides along with zero discomfort.  Don’t know what they were doing to generate that issue but I find absolutely NO PULL whatsoever using directly on face or body.  Just an easy, and very close shave on skin - much closer than the RBG - which is why I only use it 2X/week.  It shaves so good on skin, actually down to a 5 o’clock shadow.  Fabulous.  I seldom need a real shave anymore.  Plus, one of the trimmer blades is wider so my job is even easier/quicker now.  The stainless steel blades are really professional quality with precision and good solid build.

I’ve used trimmers for decades, and this one with the funny name is the most versatile & professional heavy duty solid product of them all.  It also looks great in bronze/gold and stands upright on the vanity.  Just grab n go n done.  With all the attachments and hair cutting ability it’s a one time purchase for everything.  Cannot recommend this trimmer highly enough!
review_title: This is a professional quality beard trimmer & stubble shaver (even directly on skin)

Pro: the price? Great, what more can you ask for really. I can say from experience this thing is long lasting, cuts great, the freaking battery is super impressive. I can get entire shaves (down below and up top) and it maybe drain the battery 10-15% MAX and that's with detail and no rushing. It charges great, I've used it in the shower several times and it performs awesome. The adjustable length head is amazing. It can be adjusted by 20 clicks. (0.5mm-10mm) I love that for my beard. For trimming this thing is great

 Cons: the foil head is trash. You can forget it even exists. The nose trimmer I wish was better, and changing the heads I have to spin the little nub a certain way for the head to attach correctly. (Not the biggest deal) Also the stand is so cheap i almost wish it didn't have a stand tbh. It works yes but the heads have to be placed JUSTTT right to fit and I don't even know how the guards are supposed to sit in there tbh.

Overall I would recommend it for a beard trimmer or shaver. You can get a pretty close cut with it, but if you want a clean, no stubble cut, this isn't for you. Luckily I don't care about it that much. Love this product

The Ufree Beard Trimmer is a robust grooming tool that delivers on several fronts. Its heavy-duty build exudes a sense of luxury and durability, making it feel like a premium product in hand. The cordless design adds convenience, and the battery life is impressive, allowing for multiple grooming sessions on a single charge. The stainless steel blades are sharp and glide effortlessly through hair, facilitating clean cuts and precise trims.

However, it's worth noting that while the trimmer excels in trimming and shaping, it doesn't achieve an ultra-close shave. If you're aiming for a completely smooth finish, this might not be the ideal tool. Additionally, the trimmer is lightweight and easy to handle, but some users might prefer a bit more heft for added control.

In summary, the Ufree Beard Trimmer offers excellent value for its price point. It's a reliable choice for regular beard maintenance, provided you're aware of its limitations regarding ultra-close shaving.
